name: SSG 08 | 碧蓝雕文
descriptionEn: The SSG08 bolt-action is a low-damage but very cost-effective sniper rifle, making it a smart choice for early-round long-range marksmanship. It has been custom painted with blue water, Egyptian hieroglyphs, and finished with wood running the length of the weapon. Flood warning
descriptionZh: SSG08 是一把低杀伤力但性价比较高的闩动狙击步枪，是早期回合长距离射击的明智选择。 这把武器的自定义涂装采用了碧蓝水体和木质装饰覆盖枪身，并辅以古埃及象形文字加以点缀。 洪水警报
